message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #000000
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #000000
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #D9D9E8
  ActorBorderColor #000000
  ArrowColor #000000
  ArrowThickness 2
  MessageAlign left
}

participant "PlannerNode" as PlannerNode

PlannerNode -> PlannerNode : 1 cb_trajectory(msg: Trajectory)
activate PlannerNode
PlannerNode -> PlannerNode : 2 on_update_trajectory
activate PlannerNode
deactivate PlannerNode
deactivate PlannerNode

@enduml
